---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# LTCH

```{r setup}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: false
#| comment: ""
library(ccn)
source("code/gt_theme.R")
```

## Long-Term Care Hospitals (LTCH)

```{r}
x <- ccn:::get_pin("ltch")
x |> collapse::descr()
```
